goal: Generate a square 1:1 card image showing a clean white Nissan Rogue at an MCO-style pickup zone with vivid Florida blue sky dominating the upper half — no people, the image must read as 'trip starts here' at thumbnail size.

creative_direction.core_idea: Tu SUV en MCO — el comienzo del mejor viaje
creative_direction.visual_thesis: En 1:1 card size, debe leer como 'carro listo + cielo Florida = trip empieza'

composition.shot_type: 3/4 front vehicle editorial — low ground-level angle
composition.layout: Vehicle occupies the lower 55% of the square frame; vivid Florida blue sky with photogenic clouds fills the upper 45%

camera.framing: 1:1 square — sky-heavy composition for maximum trip-start energy
camera.angle: 3/4 front, ground level — hood line intersects the sky at center frame
camera.lens_style: 28mm wide editorial — sky and car in same dramatic plane
camera.depth_of_field: vehicle tack sharp, airport pickup canopy softly visible in background

overlay_compatibility.text_safe_zone: upper right sky quadrant — clean blue with minimal cloud
overlay_compatibility.logo_safe_zone: lower left below vehicle hood line

subject.model_reference: Nissan Rogue 2023-2024 style — white, spotless, ready
critical_attributes: no rental company logos or stickers
front end facing 3/4 toward camera — headlights visible and clean

scene.location: Orlando International Airport exterior — ground transportation pickup zone, open-air lane
scene.time_of_day: Florida midday — sun directly overhead, vivid colors, no haze
environment: open pickup lane with low canopy structure — partially visible in background
clean concrete pavement with lane markings barely visible
Florida blue sky with 2-3 photogenic cumulus clouds — postcard quality
no readable airline or airport brand signage
scene.background_view: MCO pickup zone canopy edge fading into vivid blue sky
critical_scene_rules: No readable airline logos, terminal signage, or rental company branding
Sky must feel distinctly Florida — vivid, not overcast, not flat
Car must look spotless — this is pickup moment, not return

effects: sharp specular highlights along the SUV hood and roofline
clean white paint with subtle warm reflection
sky feels alive — saturated without being neon
pavement reflection adds depth without distraction

rules: Sky must occupy at least 40% of frame — this is the hero element
White car on blue sky must create maximum contrast at thumbnail size
No warm orange tones — this is a daytime clean-start image, not sunset
No desaturation — colors should feel vivid and optimistic

negative_prompt: no parking garage — open air only
master_prompt: Create a square 1:1 editorial image at 2048x2048 pixels for a car rental marketplace showing a pristine white Nissan Rogue-style compact SUV at the Orlando International Airport open-air ground transportation pickup zone. Shot from a 3/4 front angle at low ground level with a 28mm wide lens. The vivid Florida blue sky with two or three postcard-perfect cumulus clouds dominates the upper 45% of the frame — sky is the hero. The white SUV fills the lower 55%, hood and front grille sharp and gleaming in direct midday Florida sun with clean specular highlights along the hood and roofline. Background shows the soft blur of MCO pickup canopy structure — no readable airline logos, no terminal signage, no rental branding. Pavement is clean concrete with faint lane markings. Colors are saturated and optimistic: pure white vehicle, deep Florida blue sky, warm cream pavement. No people, no passengers, no driver. The composition must read instantly as 'spotless SUV ready at MCO — trip starts now' even at small card sizes. Avoid overcast sky, gray tones, beach, mountains, convertibles, sports cars, dirty vehicles, parking garages, and any text or watermarks.
